verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In these, the closing days of time, What joy the glorious hope affords, That soon oh, wondrous truth sublime! He shall reign, King of kings and Lord of lords.

verse.name: C2
V3
verse.lines: The signs around, in earth and air, Or painted on the starlit sky, God's faithful witnesses declare That the coming of the Savior draweth nigh.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: The dead in Christ who'neath us lie. In countless numbers, all shall rise When through the portals of the sky He shall come to prepare our Paradise.

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: And we who, living, yet remain, Caught up, shall meet our faithful Lord; This hope we cherish not in vain, But we comfort one another by this word.
